---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''
---

**Priority**
<!-- Critical (blocking release) | High (important gap) | Medium (nice to have) | Low (future consideration) -->

**Area**
<!-- API / Backend | Frontend / UI | CI / DevOps | Documentation | Security | Performance | Other -->

**Problem Statement**
A clear and concise description of what problem this feature solves.

**Proposed Solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Alternatives Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Acceptance Criteria**
What must be true for this to be considered complete?
- [ ] Feature works in X scenario
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests pass

**Definition of Readiness**
- [ ] Problem clearly defined
- [ ] Acceptance criteria defined
- [ ] No duplicate issue exists
- [ ] Area identified
